title: Parse docker-compose.yml for service discovery
description: Implement YAML parser to extract service names from docker-compose.yml
notes: Priority 2: Parse compose file to get service list
close_reason: Compose parser implemented. Parses YAML, extracts service names, handles errors. 6 test cases passing.

title: Docker Compose Integration
description: Auto-discover and tail logs from Docker Compose services, handle container lifecycle events
notes: Priority 7: Close after all Docker tasks complete
close_reason: Docker Compose integration complete: container discovery, log streaming, lifecycle events, and integration tests all working

title: Implement glob pattern matching for sources
description: Support source=python-* style glob patterns in query filters using filepath.Match

title: Aggregate multi-process terminal output
description: Prefix each line with [process-name] when displaying in terminal, handle output interleaving
close_reason: Terminal output now prefixes each line with [process-name]. Implemented in captureStream function. Test suite validates prefixes work correctly.

title: Implement config file loading
description: Load and parse running-man.yml from current directory or specified path

title: Add exclude filter support
description: Add exclude=pattern query parameter to filter out matching sources (supports glob)

title: Query API: Core endpoints
description: Implement GET /logs (with since, level, contains filters), GET /errors (with since filter), GET /health endpoints
close_reason: Implemented all API endpoints: GET /logs (with since, level, source, contains filters), GET /errors (errors-only filter), GET /health (with buffer stats). Added CORS support, duration parsing, comprehensive error handling. All 10 tests passing.

title: In-Memory Ring Buffer implementation
description: Fixed size/time retention (30min or 50MB), efficient append/query, thread-safe with mutex, basic indexing by timestamp and level
close_reason: Implemented full ring buffer with: size/time/byte eviction, efficient filtering (time, level, source, contains, errors-only), thread-safe operations, stats tracking. All 11 tests passing including concurrency test.

title: Add --docker-compose CLI flag
description: Add --docker-compose flag to specify path to docker-compose.yml file
notes: Priority 1: Add CLI flag first so we can accept --docker-compose path
close_reason: CLI flag added. Accepts --docker-compose path, makes --wrap optional, updates help text. Shows warning that implementation is pending.

title: Add YAML parsing library
description: Add gopkg.in/yaml.v3 dependency for config file parsing

title: Update /health endpoint with source statuses
description: Extend /health to show all active capture sources (processes + containers) with their status

title: Project Setup: Initialize Go module & structure
description: Setup project structure: cmd/running-man/main.go, internal/{wrapper,parser,storage,api}/, go.mod, README with quick start
close_reason: Created Go module, directory structure (cmd/running-man, internal/{wrapper,parser,storage,api}), skeleton files for all packages, README with quick start guide. Binary builds and runs successfully.

title: Add Docker client library dependency
description: Add github.com/docker/docker/client to go.mod and verify Docker API connectivity
close_reason: Docker client library added with wrapper, connectivity tests, and graceful degradation when Docker unavailable. All tests passing.

title: Multi-Process Support
description: Enable wrapping multiple processes simultaneously with unique source tags, parallel capture, and aggregated terminal output
close_reason: Multi-Process Support feature complete. All tasks done: --wrap flag, Manager refactor, parallel capture, exit code handling, terminal prefixes, integration tests. Can wrap 5+ processes with unique source tags.

title: CLI Interface: running-man run command
description: Implement CLI: 'running-man run -- <command>' and 'running-man run --api-port 9000 -- <command>'
close_reason: Implemented full CLI with: run command, flag parsing (--api-port), command extraction after --, integration of wrapper/parser/storage/api, graceful startup/shutdown, help/version commands. Tested end-to-end with echo command. All tests passing.

title: Phase 1: Core Foundation (MVP)
description: Prove the core value proposition with minimal features. Success: wrap single process, capture/parse errors, agent can query via API, zero-config startup.
close_reason: All Phase 1 success criteria verified and passing: ✓ Wrap single Python/Node process ✓ Capture/parse errors correctly ✓ Agent can query via API ✓ Zero-config startup ✓ All 41+ unit tests passing. Comprehensive integration test successful.

title: Add --wrap flag for multiple processes
description: Extend CLI to accept multiple --wrap flags with format: --wrap name=command
notes: ⭐ START HERE - Begin with CLI flag implementation
close_reason: Implemented --wrap flag with shellquote parsing, slug collision handling, comprehensive tests, and all code review fixes applied

title: Single Process Wrapper: Spawn & capture
description: Spawn child process with inherited environment, capture stdout/stderr, pass-through to terminal, tag with process name and timestamp, graceful signal handling (SIGINT/SIGTERM)
close_reason: Implemented full process wrapper with stdout/stderr capture, pass-through to terminal, environment inheritance, signal handling (SIGINT/SIGTERM), graceful shutdown with 5s timeout. All tests passing.

title: Merge config with CLI flags
description: CLI flags override config file values, provide sensible defaults

title: Attach to container log streams
description: Use ContainerLogs API to stream stdout/stderr from each discovered container
notes: Priority 4: Stream logs from discovered containers
close_reason: Container log streaming implemented. Demultiplexes Docker log streams, handles stdout/stderr, terminal output with prefixes. Tests passing.

title: Phase 2 success criteria verification
description: Verify: handle 5+ processes, Docker lag <5s, source filtering works, container restart handling

title: Handle container lifecycle events
description: Watch for container start/stop/restart events, reattach to logs on restart/recreation
close_reason: Container lifecycle event watching implemented. Monitors Docker events API, filters by project, handles start/restart/die/stop/kill events. Tests passing.

title: Testing: Phase 1 success criteria
description: Verify: wrap single Python/Node process, capture/parse errors correctly, agent query via API works, zero-config startup
close_reason: All Phase 1 success criteria verified and passing: ✓ Wrap single Python/Node process ✓ Capture/parse errors correctly ✓ Agent can query via API ✓ Zero-config startup ✓ All 41+ unit tests passing. Comprehensive integration test successful.

title: Implement parallel stream capture
description: Spawn goroutines to capture stdout/stderr from multiple processes concurrently
close_reason: Parallel stream capture already implemented. Manager starts all ProcessWrappers in parallel, each spawns goroutines for stdout/stderr capture. Test suite validates concurrent execution.

title: Define running-man.yml schema
description: Create Go structs for config schema: processes, docker_compose, api_port, retention

title: Enhanced Query Filters
description: Add glob matching, exclude filters, and enhanced health endpoint showing all sources

title: Handle multiple process exit codes
description: Track exit status of each process, return appropriate code when any/all processes exit
close_reason: Exit code handling complete. Manager.ExitCodes() returns map of process names to codes, Manager.Wait() returns error if any fail, main.go prints non-zero codes. Test suite validates mixed exit codes.

title: Multi-process integration test
description: End-to-end test: wrap 3+ processes, verify parallel capture, source tagging, terminal output
close_reason: Integration test implemented in test_phase2.sh. Tests 3+ processes with parallel capture, source tagging, terminal prefixes, exit codes. All 13 test cases passing.

title: Log Parsing Engine: Python tracebacks
description: Python traceback detection and grouping with regex patterns and multi-line error aggregation
close_reason: Implemented all parsers: JSON (with flexible field extraction), Python traceback (multi-line, stateful), plain text (heuristic level detection). Multi-parser with precedence: JSON > Python > plain text. All 20+ tests passing.

title: Support environment variable substitution in config
description: Allow  syntax in config file values for flexibility

title: Phase 2: Multi-Source Capture
description: Support real-world dev stacks with multiple processes and containers. Success: wrap multiple processes, capture Docker logs, source filtering works, survives container restarts.

title: Log Parsing Engine: JSON & plain text
description: JSON log parsing with field extraction, plain text with heuristic level detection (ERROR, WARN, INFO)
close_reason: Implemented all parsers: JSON (with flexible field extraction), Python traceback (multi-line, stateful), plain text (heuristic level detection). Multi-parser with precedence: JSON > Python > plain text. All 20+ tests passing.

title: Refactor wrapper for multi-process support
description: Modify wrapper.Wrapper to manage multiple child processes, each with unique source name
close_reason: Implemented Manager for multi-process orchestration. Fixed all critical concurrency issues: goroutine leak in signal handler, race condition in Restart(), timer leak in Stop(). All tests pass including race detector.

title: YAML Configuration File Support
description: Support running-man.yml for defining processes, Docker compose path, API settings, and retention policies

title: Add comprehensive filter tests
description: Unit tests for glob matching, exact matching, exclude filters, combined filters

notes: Priority 3: Find running containers for services
close_reason: Container discovery implemented. Uses Docker API with compose labels to find running containers. Project name extraction with sanitization. Tests passing.
